name: Teachings of Monkey
postCreateCommand: git submodule update --init --recursive && chmod +x scripts/install-toolchain.sh && scripts/install-toolchain.sh && grep -q 'PATH="$HOME/.local/dart-sass:$HOME/.local/hugo:$PATH"' ~/.bashrc || echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/dart-sass:$HOME/.local/hugo:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc
